data.title: Over $70 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with $27.88 million in ETH liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $70.02 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $27.88 million in ETH and $26.29 million in BTC.

data.title: Iran's Central Bank Utilizes Tether to Bolster Rial and Facilitate Trade
data.description: Iran's central bank acquired approximately $507 million in Tether (USDT) last year to strengthen its national currency, the rial, and manage international trade payments. According to NS3.AI, the acquisition was executed through two significant transactions in April and May 2023. The majority of the funds were transferred to the local exchange Nobitex. Following these transactions, conversions via a cross-chain bridge resulted in the outflow of USDT from the bank's wallet by the year's end.

data.title: Binance Wallet: Sentient (SENT) is scheduled to begin trading at 18:00 on January 22nd.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced on the X platform that Sentient (SENT) is scheduled to begin trading on January 22 at 18:00. Users who have claimed Prime Sale Keys can check their balance and start trading SENT tokens on Binance Alpha immediately after the token is listed.

data.title: Ray Dalio Highlights Shift in Global Monetary Order
data.description: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio has issued a warning about a significant transformation in the global monetary system. According to NS3.AI, central banks are moving away from fiat currencies, with gold emerging as a crucial asset. Dalio notes that gold has surpassed technology markets in performance, coinciding with a weakening US dollar. In response, central banks and sovereign wealth funds are bolstering their gold reserves to diversify and reduce exposure to risks associated with US dollar-denominated debt.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,900 USDT with a 3.70% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 21, 2026, 16:44 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,900 USDT and is now trading at 2,891.600098 USDT, with a narrowed 3.70% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: OpenAI launches Stargate Community plan to limit data‑center energy costs for local grids
data.description:
OpenAI has introduced a new Stargate Community plan to stop its AI data centers from pushing up power prices in local neighborhoods. The company says it wants to “pay its way on energy” and avoid dumping new costs on residents living near its sites. The plan is part of Stargate, a $500 billion long-term effort […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/openai-launches-stargate-community-plan/

data.title: Market Rebound Sees Increased Ethereum Holdings
data.description: On January 22, during a market rebound, 'Maji' increased their Ethereum holdings by 250 ETH, according to BlockBeats. As of the time of reporting, 'Maji' holds a 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum valued at $2.226 million, with a total of 750 ETH. The liquidation price is set at $2942.49.

data.title: Swing whale nemorino.eth bought back 3000 WETH that it sold yesterday at a price of $2991.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the whale nemorino.eth sold 3,000 WETH at $3,095 last night and bought them all back at $2,991.29 just 5 minutes ago, effectively trading to lower his average price. He currently holds a total of 7,104.13 WTH, with an average cost of $3,045.24, and is still experiencing a floating loss of $390,000.

data.title: A wallet associated with the Pudgy Penguins team deposited 397 million PENGU into Binance.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a wallet associated with the Pudgy Penguins team deposited 397 million PENGU, worth $4.02 million, into Binance.

data.title: Brother Machi has lost approximately $4.16 million this week, but he is still holding onto his long positions in Ethereum.
data.description: Arkham posted on the X platform that Machi Big Brother Ben Huang Licheng has lost $4.16 million on Hyperliquid this week, bringing his total profit and loss to a new low of -$24.5 million. However, he is still holding long positions in Ethereum, with a current position value of about $1.7 million and a floating profit of about $20,000.

data.title: The Central Bank of Iran received over $500 million in USDT last year to support its currency exchange rate.
data.description: Research by blockchain intelligence firm Elliptic indicates that the Central Bank of Iran acquired over $500 million in USDT last year. All confirmed USDT has since left wallets linked to Iran, and the report suggests the Central Bank used this stablecoin to back the price of the Iranian rial. Tom Robinson, co-founder and chief scientist at Elliptic, stated that leaked documents detail purchases made through an entity called Modex, which he believes may be a cryptocurrency broker willing to transact with the Iranian government. (Decrypt)

data.title: Rising JGB Yields and Tariff Tensions Push Bitcoin into Defensive Mode, Says Analyst
data.description:
Bitcoin declined more than 6% over the past week as Japanese government bond yields climbed to 2. 29%, the highest since 1999, while escalating U. S. –Europe trade tensions over Greenland tariffs tightened financial conditions and eroded risk appetite across global markets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/rising-jgb-yields-and-tariff-tensions-push-bitcoin-into-defensive-mode-says-analyst/

data.title: XRP Max Pain Hits $1.90 – Shakeout Before Moon?
data.description:

As institutions test assets before scaling adoption, traders are wondering if this is the dip that positions believers for the next leg […] The post XRP Max Pain Hits $1
source: https://www.techgaged.com/xrp-max-pain-hits-1-90-shakeout-before-moon/

data.title: XRP Escapes Chart Death Sentence at $1.8261 With -88% Scenario Rejected
data.description:

data.title: BlackRock Identifies Cryptocurrencies as Key Market Influencers by 2026
data.description: BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager with $10 trillion under management, has identified cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ether, and stablecoins as pivotal themes impacting markets by 2026. According to NS3.AI, the firm emphasizes blockchain technology and tokenization as transformative elements in the financial sector. This perspective underscores the increasing institutional acknowledgment of digital assets' expanding influence within the global financial system.
